---
title: "Recognition"
subtitle: "Awards, scholarships, and honors"
description-meta: "Awards, scholarships, and honors received by Andrés André Camargo Bertel"
title-block-banner: false
---

| Year | Recognition | Awarded by |
|:----:|:------------|:-----------|
| 2024 | Best Adjunct Professor Award | Universidad del Norte |
| 2024 | 100k-Clima Fellowship | Penn State University |
| 2024 | National PhD Scholarship (Call 933) | Minciencias |
| 2022 | Julio Muvdi Master's Scholarship | Universidad del Norte |
| 2022 | Academic Excellence Recognition | Universidad del Norte |
| 2016 | "Ser Pilo Paga" National Scholarship | Ministry of National Education (Mineducación) |

: {.striped .hover tbl-colwidths="[12,58,30]"}
